refund_policy.description: No refunds offered. Services are intangible and non-revocable.
refund_policy.details: Once payment is submitted, customer is responsible for all charges. Smallest package available for testing.

sla.description: Service quality complies with conditions stipulated in Service Level Agreement (SLA).

kyc.notes: No explicit KYC requirements found in public documentation.

payment_terms.notes: Testing via smallest package recommended before larger purchases.
